message:
feat(rich_rust): expanded interactive mode, theming, and comprehensive test suite

Major enhancements to the Rich terminal formatting library, adding
sophisticated interactive capabilities, comprehensive theming support,
and extensive test coverage for reliability.

## Interactive Mode (src/interactive.rs) [+517 lines]
- Implemented interactive prompt system for user input
- Added auto-completion support with Tab navigation
- Implemented history with arrow key navigation
- Added multi-line input mode for text blocks
- Implemented input validation with error display
- Added masked input for password entry
- Implemented choice selection with numbered options

## Renderable Group (src/renderables/group.rs) [+406 lines]
- Implemented renderable grouping for composite layouts
- Added vertical and horizontal group arrangements
- Implemented gap and spacing configuration
- Added alignment options (start, center, end, stretch)
- Implemented overflow handling strategies

## Theme System (src/theme.rs) [+327 lines]
- Implemented comprehensive theme definition system
- Added built-in themes: monokai, dracula, nord, gruvbox, solarized
- Implemented theme inheritance for customization
- Added semantic color mapping (success, warning, error, info)
- Implemented theme loading from JSON/TOML files
- Added theme validation and fallback handling

## Color Handling (src/color.rs) [+5 lines]
- Minor color conversion refinements

## Console (src/console.rs) [refactored]
- Improved output handling
- Better terminal detection

## Test Suite

### Property Tests (tests/property_tests.rs) [+168 lines, refactored]
- Expanded property-based testing coverage
- Added style composition invariant tests
- Implemented rendering consistency verification

### Thread Safety (tests/thread_safety.rs) [+179 lines]
- Added concurrent access tests for shared resources
- Implemented race condition detection tests
- Added lock ordering verification

### E2E Tests [NEW]
- tests/e2e_combined.rs: Full workflow integration tests
- tests/e2e_export.rs: Export format verification
- tests/e2e_interactive.rs: Interactive mode testing

### Fuzzing Tests [NEW]
- tests/fuzz_markup_parser.rs: Markup parsing fuzzer
- tests/fuzz_style_parser.rs: Style string fuzzer
- tests/fuzz_style_parser.proptest-regressions: Regression cases

### Error Handling Tests [NEW]
- tests/mutex_poison_recovery.rs: Poison recovery testing
- tests/terminal_detection_errors.rs: Terminal detection edge cases

Also syncs beads issue tracker and proptest regression data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc d84fbdd3f8f6fd5df069b5375172e53644da07a1a0f15059058dcc56e51d8fb3 # shrinks to input = "#Ⱥ"
+cc 36fe6e89df093171699126e4228a13548b3fd1d2812b53ca8130fe7826d787b8 # shrinks to input = "#᪠"

@@ -5,3 +5,4 @@
 # It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
 # everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
 cc 4c39df6eda6551829acad2652237058dcf7cf16d2ab99d572f7470587441c4a0 # shrinks to text = "A000aaA", offsets = [7, 0]
+cc 793f56b67ed422d6f84cda8ae3dd80573286a9b2bdc6c7945e9b9b0edf4fd124 # shrinks to num_rows = 1, cell_text = "0 aAa  0AAa0a0 AAAAAAaa aa0Aa0AA 0a00 AAaAAaaa 0a0a00A a0AA0A a Aaa0 0aaaA0aA"
